name: RWJ_optimize_joint_placement
description: This component optimizes the placement of joints in roundwood elements based on their surfaces and degrees of freedom.

inputParameters.name: i_joinery
inputParameters.description: The defined joinery for a single beam.

inputParameters.name: i_point_cloud
inputParameters.description: The point cloud of the roundwood element.

inputParameters.name: i_reference_diameter
inputParameters.description: The reference diameter of the roundwood element. This is used to scale the optimisation steps.

inputParameters.name: i_n_steps
inputParameters.description: The maximum number of optimization steps to perform. if the i_epsilon is met before the i_n_steps, the optimisation is interrupted.

inputParameters.name: i_epsilon
inputParameters.description: The convergence threshold for the optimization. Lower values might be unreachable depending on the geometry and constraints. Use reasonable values such as 1.0 mm.

outputParameters.name: o_beam
outputParameters.description: The beam object with its joints optimally placed.

outputParameters.name: o_transform_matrices
outputParameters.description: A list of transformation matrices for each joint group.
